历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 5260 → 8913 → 8260 → 6271 → 8563, showing overall large fluctuations. In 2022, due to a gap, it significantly dropped to 8913, then recovered in 2023–2024, but moved back to 8563 in 2025, showing a backward trend in the last two years. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 194 → 193 → 176 → 174 → 194, returning to 194 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 191 students, a slight reduction of 3 students (-1.5%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 14th in 2021 → 11th in 2022 → 12th in 2023 → 15th in 2024 → 15th in 2025 → 16th in 2026, consistently in the top 20 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength. In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative (51 events, 46 negative), mainly involving academic misconduct (doctoral supervisor jointly reported) and teacher ethics, which may inhibit some candidates' willingness to apply, pushing the ranking number higher. Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. In 2022–2023, there was a record of a significant drop in admission scores due to a gap. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was clearly negative (subway incident, etc.), and historical negative public opinion has a lagging effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there were 19 disciplines rated A- or above: Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese History A, etc. Advantageous disciplines such as Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Mathematics, and Computer Science are highly related to Physics Category enrollment majors, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Clinical Medicine, and Stomatology continue to be highly recommended, matching well with Sichuan University's advantageous disciplines, and competition for related majors may intensify. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Anhui is 451,000, slightly lower than the 2025 total (History Category 141,400 + Physics Category 320,779 = 462,179) by about 2.4%. Physics Category, estimated at about 69.4% of recent years, is about 313,000 candidates, slightly lower than the 2025 Physics Category of 320,779, slightly easing competition pressure. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (Southwest region), and Anhui candidates apply across provinces without local enrollment preference. The university's enrollment in Anhui in recent years is about 174–194 students, accounting for about 2–3% of total national enrollment, which is moderate.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8563, a slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (-3 students) slightly intensifying competition, a clearly negative reputation possibly inhibiting some candidates' willingness to apply (ranking number increases), but a slight decrease in total candidates and the attraction of advantageous disciplines offsetting, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is around 8534, with a fluctuation range of 8034–9034.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated/Five-Year)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year/Five-Year)
- Computer Science (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Mathematics (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
- Cyberspace Security (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Physics
- Biomedical Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Advanced Chemical Engineering and High-End Equipment)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Green City and Smart Construction)
- Chemistry
- Public Health and Preventive Medicine
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 8534, range 8034–9034. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (9034) can focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction. Those with rankings better than the lower limit (8034) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology, Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, Mathematics). Those with rankings near the upper limit can choose Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Sichuan University's Stomatology A+ and Clinical Medicine A are top national levels, with extremely intense competition, so high-scoring candidates are advised to prioritize them.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 704 → 957 → 1556 → 922 → 2784, showing an overall backward trend. In 2025, due to the splitting of major groups (Group (005) minimum ranking 2784), there was a significant backward shift, about 1862 places behind 2024 (922). From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 10 → 12 → 19 → 23 → 22, indicating a clear expansion trend. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 23, a slight increase of 1 person (+4.5%) compared to 2025 (22), which slightly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 16th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, firmly in the top 20 nationally, with strong comprehensive strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was significantly negative (51 events, 46 negative), mainly involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and other public opinion issues, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with medium-high short video exposure. In 2023, the reputation evaluation was also significantly negative (subway incident, etc.), and historical negative public opinion has a lagging effect on application enthusiasm. Sichuan University has outstanding advantages in liberal arts: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Marxist Theory A, Archaeology A-, etc., which highly match the History Category enrollment majors (Humanities Experimental Class, History Class, Law, Economics Class, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language/Literature have high social popularity and are recommended as hot, while Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged (the Zhang Xuefeng effect continues). In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Anhui is 451,000, with History Category estimated at about 138,000 based on the recent proportion of about 30.6%, a slight decrease of about 2.4% from 141,400 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu, and Anhui candidates apply across provinces, with no local enrollment preference. The number of History Category enrollments in Anhui in recent years is about 22–23, accounting for a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2784 (Group (005)), the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+1 person) slightly eases competition, negative reputation may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply (ranking number increases), but the slight decrease in total candidates and the attractiveness of liberal arts disciplines form a counterbalance. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be around 2890, with a fluctuation range of 2543–3237.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2890, with a range of 2543–3237. Candidates with rankings within the upper limit of the range (3237) can focus on Tier 2 majors, while those with rankings better than the lower limit (2543) can aim for Tier 1 majors (Humanities Experimental Class, Law, Economics Class). Sichuan University's Chinese Language and Literature A+ is a national top-level program, and the Humanities Experimental Class is the most competitive, so high-scoring candidates are advised to prioritize it.
